note: Day 28 (Friday). POST-CAMPAIGN MILESTONE. All Batch 1-4 email sequences assumed complete after yesterday's fu_046-049 (leads 52/55/50/56, Day-14 breakups). ZERO active connection notes today. No Batch 5 Ryedale data received — no new leads to generate notes for. Post-breakup contingency remains live for any pending connection requests from Day 26 (2026-04-23) that were sent but not yet accepted. LinkedIn note generation resumes with Batch 5 Ryedale leads (earliest Monday 2026-04-28 sends → Thursday 2026-04-30 notes).

strategy.tone: slightly awkward genuine compliment — stands out from polished AI outreach slop
anti_patterns: Do not use 'I came across your profile'
Do not use 'I was impressed by'
Do not mention AI or automation
Do not pitch in the note — curiosity only
Do not use 'reach out' or 'touch base'
Do not mention 'digital marketing' or 'web design' explicitly
strategy.priority_upgrade_rule: HANDS: always check LinkedIn profile for posts from last 60 days BEFORE sending any note. If post found: use post_reference note (3-4x higher acceptance rate). If no recent posts: use generic note. This step was NOT executed across 8 consecutive BRAIN runs in Batch 1-4 — it is MANDATORY for Batch 5.
strategy.execution_protocol_batch_5: HANDS must open LinkedIn, search, check for posts, and send the note in a SINGLE SESSION on Day 3, 4, 5, or 6 after initial email. Do not split search and send across days. The window closes automatically on Day 7 when the follow-up email fires.

no_active_notes_reason: POST-CAMPAIGN HOLD. All Batch 1-4 leads have completed their Day-14 breakup touchpoints (sequences assumed complete as of yesterday 2026-04-24). No Batch 5 leads exist yet. No leads are in the Day 3-6 LinkedIn eligibility window.

post_breakup_contingency.applies_if: HANDS sent LinkedIn connection requests to leads 52/55/50/56 on Day 26 (2026-04-23) but those requests have not yet been accepted — and a lead accepts the request today (2026-04-25) or later
post_breakup_contingency.rule: If a lead accepts post-breakup: send the if_accepted_message from the archived note ONLY. Do NOT reference the breakup email. Do NOT reference the email sequence. Do NOT mention the campaign. Respond naturally as a new LinkedIn connection.
post_breakup_contingency.probability: LOW — but these four requests (if they were sent) may still be pending in the connection queue. Monitor for 30 days post-send.
post_breakup_contingency.confirmed_sent_status: UNCONFIRMED — BRAIN has received zero linkedin_profiles.json files across 8 consecutive runs. It is UNKNOWN whether HANDS sent any connection requests at any point during the campaign.

batch_5_note_templates.status: READY — templates prepared. Note generation begins on Day 3 after Batch 5 initial emails fire.
batch_5_note_templates.post_reference_template: [Name] — saw your post about [X]. [Business] caught my eye looking at [trade] businesses in [town]. Noticed something about the site worth mentioning. Connecting in case it's useful.
batch_5_note_templates.generic_template: [Name] — [Business] came up when I was looking at [trade] businesses in [town]. Something about the [website/online presence] caught my attention. Connecting in case it's relevant.
batch_5_note_templates.headline_template: [Name] — [headline reference] caught my attention. [Business] came up when I was looking at [trade] businesses in [town]. Noticed something about the online presence. Connecting in case it's useful.
batch_5_note_templates.char_limit_reminder: All notes must be trimmed to ≤200 chars before sending. Count carefully — LinkedIn's free account limit is absolute.

upgrade_decision_matrix.post_from_last_60_days_found: USE post_reference — highest acceptance rate (3-4x over generic)
upgrade_decision_matrix.distinctive_headline_found: USE headline — e.g. 'Malton's only RICS-registered surveyor' → reference the credential
upgrade_decision_matrix.active_profile_no_recent_post: USE generic — still effective, clean, non-AI-sounding
upgrade_decision_matrix.inactive_profile_or_no_profile: SKIP — log in linkedin_profiles.json as 'not_found' or 'inactive'. Do not send generic to a profile with zero activity.

sector_priority_batch_5.note: Ryedale target categories include joiners, builders, plumbers — expect lower LinkedIn presence for these trades. Prioritise SSL leads in high-LinkedIn sectors first.

campaign_linkedin_assessment.root_cause: HANDS execution latency. LinkedIn window (Day 3-6) is narrow and cannot be recovered once missed. Notes were generated correctly by BRAIN on 7 consecutive runs. Zero notes were confirmed sent by HANDS.
campaign_linkedin_assessment.key_learning: The 'post_reference upgrade' step requires HANDS to check each profile BEFORE sending — this step was not executed once. For Batch 5: HANDS must open LinkedIn, search, check for posts, and send in a SINGLE session on the correct day.
campaign_linkedin_assessment.batch_5_protocol_change: BRAIN will flag Day 3 LinkedIn send day explicitly in daily_signals.json as a MANDATORY action item. HANDS execution within 2 hours of the BRAIN run is the target. If HANDS cannot execute within 4 hours: note the reason in CHANGELOG.md so BRAIN can log the gap.
